title: Aale Saachuputta Kannalaa Lyrics Vil Ambu Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer(s) : Anirudh Ravichander
Movie:  Vil Ambu
Music: Navin
Lyrics : Ekadesi

Aale saachuutta Kannaala
Ayyo thaangalaye ennaala
Moochai vaangi pora munnaala
Paechey ninnuruchu thannaala

Nenjukulla pallanguzhi
Kundhikittu aadura
Noothi yettu kondaangada
BP yathaan yaethura

Na Na Naanana naanaana
Naanaana Naanaana Naanna Naananna
Naana naanna Naa Naa na

Kaanama ponen da goyyale
Ennamo aachuda meiyale
Thala keezha nadukuren kaiyale
Ippa mentala aayiten avalaale

Naa lungiya yethi dhan kattuven
Ippa tharayathaan kootavacha
Naa settaiya sevaya seiven
En vaalathaan surutta vacha
Naano thani aalu
Ava serndha sema dhoolu
Onna number 420 ya
Hero vaa aaki putta

Naano Kaanama ponen da goyyale

Thala keezha nadukuren kaiyale
Ippa mentala aayiten avalaale

Un nagatha nee kadichidhan thupure
Ada tharaiyellam pookudhu de
Enna ishtama paarthu dhan sirikure
Ulla jivvunu yerudha de
Podi sandalee
unnale thavichen de
Onna number 420 ya

enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the vibrant energy of Aale Saachuputta Kannalaa from the movie Vil Ambu, a captivating Tamil song that blends rhythmic beats with Anirudh's dynamic vocals. Composed by Navin and penned by Ekadasi, this track is a perfect choice for celebrations and lively occasions. Dive into the pulsating vibes of this musical masterpiece and let its charm elevate your spirits.
stanzaMeanings: Singer(s): Anirudh Ravichander, Movie: Vil Ambu, Music: Navin, Lyrics: Ekadesi
She captivated me with her eyes; oh, I can't bear it anymore. I'm moving forward, catching my breath, but her words have left me stunned.
Inside my heart, a game of Pallanguzhi is being played, and it's dancing around. My blood pressure is rising to its peak.
Na Na Naanana naanaana Naanaana Naanaana Naanna Naananna Naana naanna Naa Naa na
I disappeared, oh dear; something happened to me, truly. I'm trembling with my head down, and now I've become mentally affected because of her.

She captivated me with her eyes; oh, I can't bear it anymore. I'm moving forward, catching my breath, but her words have left me stunned. I disappeared, oh dear; something happened to me, truly. I'm trembling with my head down, and now I've become mentally affected because of her.

I would lift my lungi and tie it; now it's just lying on the ground. I would do my stylish work, but now my tail is curled up. I was a lone wolf, but when she joined, it became a grand celebration. She turned a number 420 into a hero.
I disappeared, oh dear; something happened to me, truly. I'm trembling with my head down, and now I've become mentally affected because of her.

You bite your nails and spit them out; the ground is blooming because of you. You smile at me with affection, and it makes my heart leap. Oh, mischievous one, because of you, I've changed. You turned a number 420 into a hero.
